name: Margo Moceyunas
school: Department of Astronomy and Planetary Science
focus: Planetary science education • Undergraduate instruction • Astronomy teaching support
bio: Margo Moceyunas is a graduate student in Astronomy and Planetary Science at Northern Arizona University, where she also serves as a Graduate Teaching Assistant. In this role, she supports instruction in undergraduate courses, including laboratory sections such as Exploring the Planets (AST 190L). Her work is primarily focused within the academic and teaching environment, contributing to student learning in planetary science. While publicly available information about her research is limited, her role reflects involvement in both graduate-level study and instructional support within the department.
